description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house with a complex layout, featuring a mix of hip and flat roof sections. The exterior combines light-colored walls with a brick or stone base, and there are multiple balconies and terraces, including a prominent upper-level terrace with railings. The backyard area includes a swimming pool surrounded by lounge chairs, a detached garage or pool house, and a landscaped lawn with a tree. The main entryway is accessed by a wide staircase leading up to a covered porch, and the house features numerous windows of varying sizes, some arranged in rows and others more asymmetrically. Architectural details include arched openings, a covered patio, and a blend of traditional and modern design elements.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a mix of hip and flat roofs, a pool, terraces, and a detached garage, featuring brick and light-colored walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, covered porch, large windows, and the pool area with lounge chairs and a detached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, detached garage, arched patio, and upper terrace with railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balconies, upper terrace, and the brick base of the house with fewer visible windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, tree, and the side of the house with a row of columns and a secondary entry.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Traditional and Modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with some rows and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide staircase, covered porch with columns, and a prominent front door.
